titles.en: A Characteristic Due to One’s Chivalry
A Characteristic Due to One’s Chivalry

segments: : قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وآله: من المروءة استصلاح المال
arabic.text: : قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وآله: من المروءة استصلاح المال

segments: 1-34 Muhammad ibn Ali Majiluyih - may God be pleased with him - narrated that his uncle Muhammad ibn Abil-Qasim quoted on the authority of Ahmad ibn Aba Abdullah al-Barqy, on the authority of Isma’il ibn Mihran, on the authority of Salih ibn Sa’id, on the authority of Aban ibn Taqlib, on the authority of Abi Ja’far al-Baqir (MGB) that God’s Prophet (MGB) said, ““From chivalry is the improvement of wealth.”.”
en.dr-ali-peiravi.text: 1-34 Muhammad ibn Ali Majiluyih - may God be pleased with him - narrated that his uncle Muhammad ibn Abil-Qasim quoted on the authority of Ahmad ibn Aba Abdullah al-Barqy, on the authority of Isma’il ibn Mihran, on the authority of Salih ibn Sa’id, on the authority of Aban ibn Taqlib, on the authority of Abi Ja’far al-Baqir (MGB) that God’s Prophet (MGB) said, ““From chivalry is the improvement of wealth.”.”

narratorChain.raw: 1-34 حدثنا محمد بن علي ماجيلويه رضي الله عنه، عن عمه محمد بن أبي القاسم، عن أحمد بن أبي عبد الله البرقي، عن إسماعيل بن مهران، عن صالح بن سعيد، عن أبان بن تغلب، عن أبي جعفر عليه السلام قال

parts.text: محمد بن علي ماجيلويه رضي الله عنه،
أحمد بن أبي عبد الله البرقي،
